parsed_output.justification: Justin's claims are completely contradictory throughout the discussion; he claims to be the Robber, then a Werewolf, then a Seer (claiming to see two Werewolves in the center), and then a Werewolf again. This erratic behavior is characteristic of either a Werewolf attempting to confuse the group or a Tanner attempting to be voted out. Since he explicitly admits to being a Werewolf multiple times, he is the most suspicious player and the most logical target for Team Village to eliminate.
